channel.title: Documentation on UnityChip Verification
channel.description: Recent content in Documentation on UnityChip Verification

item.title: Xiangshan UT module maintainer
item.description: Contribute to core module verification and co-build trusted verification framework

item.title: Beginner Course
item.description: Get started with UnityChip platform - from zero to hardware verification

item.title: Beginner Tasks
item.description: Learn the Unity Chip framework and tools through hands-on practice, and complete a full verification workflow

item.title: Lecture 2 · Installation and Usage of Picker
item.description: Introduces the installation and use of Picker with Python as an example

item.title: Lecture 5 · Case Study: Nutshell Cache
item.description: Introduces how to start a verification task, complete Chisel-to-Verilog conversion, and verify Nutshell Cache requirements
